title: Identification of Sources of Resistance to Sorghum Downy Mildew in Late-flowering Sorghum Germplasm
abstract: A total of 800 sorghum accessions was screened for resistance to Peronosclerospora sorghi in greenhouse trials during 1991-92. The accessions IS 18512, IS 18552, IS 18713, IS 18714, IS 19018, IS 19096, IS 19105, IS 19239, IS 20049 and IS 20205 remained free of disease. Incidence of P. sorghi was <5% in a further 4 accessions and 5-10% in 9 accessions.
